quote: Your boss cannot give you more work if you do not finish the work you have.
author: Moeny

quote: You will never disappoint your parents, if they already expect absolutely nothing.
author: Moeny

quote: I love my job, only when I am on vacation.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Why do today, when there's tomorrow?
author: Moeny

quote: How can you make sure you never miss your target? Shoot first, and whatever you hit, call it the target.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Sleep first, problems later.
author: Moeny

quote: Being lazy is just being calm.
author: Moeny

quote: Doing nothing today is just saving energy for tomorrow.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you don't try, you won't fail.
author: Moeny

quote: Resting all day is still a plan.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: At the end of the, the day ends.
author: Moeny

quote: The future is tomorrow, but today is now and if you walk far enough you'll be somewhere else.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: When you're speaking, you're no longer silent.
author: Moeny

quote: When nothing makes sense, add more nothing.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: The key to success is losing the key.
author: Moeny

quote: When the door is closed, open it.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you can't sleep at night, you are awake.
author: Moeny

quote: There are no stupid questions, just stupid people.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Study is temporary, dumb is forever
author: Moeny

quote: If you want to see, open your eyes.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you forget something, just remember it.
author: Moeny

quote: If a failure doesn't let you learn, then be a failure.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: They'll call you a racist but never a lair.
author: Moeny

quote: If you want to be successful, just be successful.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you don't know what to do, do nothing.
author: Moeny

quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it, but the best way to create the future is to wait for it.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: You miss 100% of the shots you dont take, you also miss 100% of the if your dont have arms or legs
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: You're tired when you are about to go sleep, but you are also tired when you wake up, whats the point in sleeping?
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: my girlfriend complains that she has a migraine tell her to take meds then complains when they dont work straight away
author: Ollie the Dolly
